title: Live streaming at scale
description: Sub-second latency live video and audio from one publisher to many viewers, with caching and fan-out built into the transport.

title: Real-time multiplayer
description: Low-latency state sync for games and collaborative applications across many concurrent participants.

title: Live data fan-out
description: Financial market data, sports feeds, telemetry, IoT sensor streams, and other one-to-many data distribution.

title: Browser-native low-latency
description: Direct delivery to browsers over WebTransport, without plugins, server-side bridging, or protocol gymnastics.

title: Generic pub/sub and relay
description: Publish/subscribe and data relay between services, regions, and clients on the open Internet.
